buildingID.description: Id of the building associated with this lease.

contacts.description: List of the current tenants on the lease.

createdDateTime.description: Date and time the record was created. (Timezone: UTC)

endDate.description: End date of the lease term.

lastModifiedBy.description: User who last modified the record.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: Date and time the record was last modified. (Timezone: UTC)

lateFeeRule.description: Textual description of the late fee rule applied to delinquent or unpaid lease charges.

location.description: Building and/or units the lease is currently attached to.

moveInDate.description: Day that the tenant(s) moved into the property.

moveOutDate.description: Day that the tenant(s) vacated the property.

noticeGivenDate.description: Day that the tenant(s) turned in a notice to vacate.

paymentRestriction.description: Indicates if the lease has any payment types that they are prevented from using. For example, a lease with several bounced checks may be restricted from paying with checks for future payments.

portfolioID.description: Id of the portfolio associated with this lease.

publicAssistanceProgram.description: Indicates if the tenant(s) of the lease receive any aid from a Public Assistance Program.

scheduleMoveOutDate.description: Day that the tenant(s) are expected to vacate the property.

startDate.description: Start date of the lease term.

tenantsOptsIntoAssetProtectionPlan.description: Indicates if the tenants opted into Asset Protection Plan.

unitID.description: Id of the unit associated with this lease.
